input.subject: Appointment Confirmation - Dr. Smith
input.body_text:
Dear Patient,

This confirms your upcoming appointment:

Patient: John Doe
Provider: Dr. Emily Smith
Date: Tuesday, January 28, 2026
Time: 10:30 AM
Location: Springfield Health Clinic, 456 Medical Plaza, Suite 200

Please arrive 15 minutes early to complete any necessary paperwork.

If you need to reschedule, please call us at (555) 123-4567.

Thank you,
Springfield Health Clinic
